summary: DHS montage built around footage of Trump speaking at a joint session of Congress, cut with footage of a crowd walking up a road and an image of a man's face beside a young woman, with large animated captions: 'FIRST DUTY OF THE AMERICAN GOVERNMENT', '*DEMOCRATS REMAIN SEATED*', 'ALL OVER OUR COUNTRY' (with 'COUNTRY' in red), and 'DANGEROUS REPEAT OFFENDERS' over the word 'GUILTY'.

script.scene: Trump at the rostrum of a joint session of Congress (flags behind), tight punch-in shot. Large gray typography over him: 'FIRST DUTY OF THE AMERICAN GOVERNMENT'.
Wide handheld-style shot of the congressional chamber with members seated; white caption '*DEMOCRATS REMAIN SEATED*' at bottom.
Footage of a large crowd walking up a road past vehicles in daylight; caption '...ALL OVER OUR COUNTRY.' with 'COUNTRY' highlighted in red.
Trump speaking at the rostrum, red tie, flag backdrop; vertical crop.
Overlay of a man's face beside a smiling young woman; red caption 'DANGEROUS REPEAT OFFENDERS' over the white word 'GUILTY' filling the lower frame.

notable_text: FIRST DUTY OF THE AMERICAN GOVERNMENT / *DEMOCRATS REMAIN SEATED* / ...ALL OVER OUR COUNTRY. / DANGEROUS REPEAT OFFENDERS / GUILTY / tweet: 'We STAND with @POTUS Trump. We STAND with Angel Families. We STAND with AMERICANS.'
